name: Google Drive Invoice Summary Email Agent — exact DB DSL (Phase D mocked + Phase E live)
description: Captured AS IS from agent 6ef48513-f49c-4635-b0dc-bdd9bf2f80a6 (created 2026-06-02T17:21:55.615+00:00). Exact DB pilot_steps + configured input_values — no LLM, no recompile, no IntentContract. `dsl_provided: true` tells run-regression.ts to skip Compile + Phase A and run the committed DB DSL through Phase D (mocked). Phase E (live) runs via test-live-agent-execution.ts (file-based): the DSL is persisted to agents.pilot_steps and the config to agent_configurations.input_values before executing, so edits to these files are saved on the agent in the DB.

status.phase_d: PASS — verified 2026-06-10 (mocked WorkflowPilot, 10/10 steps). NOTE: Phase D mocks return stub data, so it passes despite the live bugs below — the mocks hide the real Drive/extractor failures.
status.phase_e: FAIL — live run 2026-06-10 (execution captured in output/vocabulary-pipeline/live-execution-report.json). Two confirmed bugs (below).
status.phase_e_failure_reason: BUG 1 (extraction): every document-extractor.extract_structured_data call returns success:false with all 8 fields missing. The DSL has no download step before the extractor and feeds step4 file_content = the Drive list-item METADATA object (no bytes). Deeper root cause: document-extractor requires base64 file bytes, but google-drive.read_file_content does `downloadResponse.text()` on non-Google-Doc files (google-drive-plugin-executor.ts ~L326), corrupting binary PDFs — so no Drive action yields the base64 the extractor needs. BUG 2 (wrong folder): step1 list_files has params:{} — the configured folder_link was never bound to folder_id, so Drive listed the My-Drive ROOT (20 mixed items) instead of folder 1TAUlds9…. The filter then kept 2 stray root PDFs (a 'Welcome Playbook' + an Expedia PDF), not the 3 receipts in the configured folder. Email therefore showed 2 'Extraction failed' lines from the wrong files.

run.phase_d_note: Run as part of the suite: npx tsx --import ./scripts/env-preload.ts tests/v6-regression/run-regression.ts
run.phase_e_note: Requires TEST_USER_ID in .env.local to equal the agent owner above. Live run reads real plugins and is outward-facing (sends real email).
